**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Ningbo Huateng Feichi Automotive Electrical Technology Co., Ltd. (formerly 'Beijing BAIC Feichi Automotive Electrical') is a highly specialized manufacturer of automotive starter motors and alternators. Established in 2004, the company's historical name explicitly ties it to the BAIC Group (Beijing Automotive Industry Holding Co., Ltd.) supply chain. Its strategic relocation from Beijing to Yuyao (Ningbo) aligns with the broader migration of automotive component manufacturing to the Yangtze River Delta to optimize supply chain efficiencies. Despite a fully paid-in capital of ~8.18M RMB, its current 'micro' size (4 insured employees) suggests it may function as a specialized R&D or sales node, or has heavily outsourced its physical production while retaining core technology and import/export capabilities.
